author: Canadianman
text: Liverpool 2026/27 Season - Iraola Officially Confirmed13 minutes agovia mobileReplyQuoteSelect PostDeselect PostLink to PostMemberGive GiftBack to TopPost by Canadianman on13 minutes ago21 hours agoMuffinssaid:The biggest concern I have is the same concern I had with Slot and even with Klopp - teams do not play against Bournemouth or against any team Iraola has managed the way they play against Liverpool.  He has never had to figure out how to beat a low block.  Klopp made it work not just by being a brilliant coach but also by assembling the best team we had in over 30 years.  I don’t know how realistic it is to even hope Iraola will have the same success in the transfer market.He will be fine just stick to your principles and the way you want to play and give us Liverpool fans the football we want to see and the results will follow
